{
  "claims": [
    "Foster kids are particularly vulnerable to being targeted by criminals for child labor trafficking.",
    "Senate Bill 584 will require family training for foster parents to include information on protecting children from child labor trafficking.",
    "SB 584 adds 'child labor trafficking' to the list of subjects foster families are required to receive training about.",
    "Labor trafficking can be difficult to detect and can often be hidden within legitimate businesses or industries.",
    "Previous legislation (AB 865) did not include training on child labor trafficking despite its prevalence in California among foster youth."
